title: AudioHate - Audio Hate Speech Detection
description: Audio hate speech detection with explanations. Annotators classify audio clips for hate speech presence, identify target groups, and note acoustic indicators such as tone, emphasis, and prosody (Guo et al., SIGDIAL 2024).
citation:

    year = "2024",
